name: 374Water Inc.
summary: 374Water Inc. (SCWO) is a cleantech and environmental services company developing supercritical water oxidation (SCWO) technology for destruction of organic waste streams. Its proprietary AirSCWO technology destroys hazardous and non-hazardous organic wastes including PFAS, biosolids, and industrial solvents, producing safe water, minerals, and recoverable heat energy. The company serves municipal, federal, and industrial markets through capital equipment sales, Waste Destruction Services (WDS), laboratory testing, and operations and maintenance services.
